'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
