==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yin Wood Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the Etsugai [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows. === Selected Day (éļæĨ) === Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five ==Years of Yin Wood Pig==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 15 when divided by 60 is a year of Etsugai ({{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year}}).

==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows.
=== Selected Day (éļæĨ) ===
Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Etsu|ja|äđ|1=Kinoto (äđ)|lt=Kinoto (äđ)|2=ja|3=äđ|4=zh|5=äđ|1=Kinoto (äđ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto ==Years of Yin Wood Pig==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 15 when divided by 60 is a year of Etsugai ({{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year}}).

==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows.
=== Selected Day (éļæĨ) ===
Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows.
=== Selected Day (éļæĨ) ===
Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Etsu|ja|äđ|1=Kinoto (äđ)|lt=Kinoto (äđ)|2=ja|3=äđ|4=zh|5=äđ|1=Kinoto (äđ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto ==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows.
=== Selected Day (éļæĨ) ===
Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly ==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows.
=== Selected Day (éļæĨ) ===
Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly ==Years of Yin Wood Pig==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 15 when divided by 60 is a year of Etsugai ({{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}).

|+'''Years of Etsugai (äđäšĨãŪåđī)'''

==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows.

==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Etsugai is as follows.
=== Selected Day (éļæĨ) ===
Etsugai day is the 6th day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|įŊå|lt=Hando|lt_ja=åĪ§å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Pig also known as äđäšĨ''' (kinotoi (äđäšĨ), otsubokunoinoshishi (äđäšĨ), itsugai (äđäšĨ)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 12th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jikotsu|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|įēæ|lt=Jikotsu|lt_ja=įēæ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jikotsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|äļå­|1=Yang Fire Rat|lt=Besshi|lt_ja=äļå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=é°é―äščĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the element represented by the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Etsu|ja|äđ|1=Kinoto (äđ)|lt=Kinoto (äđ)|2=ja|3=äđ|4=zh|5=äđ|1=Kinoto (äđ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (äđ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (äđ)|qq=}} signifies yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (æĻ)|1=Wood ==Months of Yin Wood Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the Etsugai {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.
